subtitles.original: Announcement, announcement! Takanashi Kiara Birthday Merchandise 2026!

subtitles.original: Here is the banner.

subtitles.original: First of all, the big item that is the main character is...
subtitles.english: First of all, the big item that is the main character is...

subtitles.original: ...抱き枕だー！
subtitles.english: ...a body pillow cover!

subtitles.original: I finally did it! After so many years of doing merchandise, I might be running out of ideas a little bit, so...
subtitles.english: I finally did it! After so many years of doing merchandise, I might be running out of ideas a little bit, so...

subtitles.original: ...I did something that originally I never thought I would do.
subtitles.english: ...I did something that originally I never thought I would do.

subtitles.original: KFP, don't leave me hanging. Leave me... laying on the bed. Yeah!
subtitles.english: KFP, don't leave me hanging. Leave me... laying on the bed. Yeah!

subtitles.original: １つ目のアイテムはなんと！一生やらないと思ってたんですけど...

subtitles.original: やっぱりここまで活動するともう出すしかなかった。抱き枕です！いぇーい！
subtitles.english: ...but after being active for this long, I had to release it. A body pillow cover! Yay!

subtitles.original: Next, we have a really cute plushie set...
subtitles.english: Next, we have a really cute plushie set...

subtitles.original: ...of my kitty cat babies: Smoothie and Chonkers!
subtitles.english: ...of my kitty cat babies: Smoothie and Chonkers!

subtitles.original: They are so cute and fluffy, and I can bring them everywhere now, and you should too!

subtitles.original: You can hang them on your bag or keys.

subtitles.original: キーチェーンなどとして使えます。どこにでも連れてってあげてください。

subtitles.original: Next one is these badges, but they are a bit unusual because this time they are square...
subtitles.english: Next one is these badges, but they are a bit unusual because this time they are square...

subtitles.original: ...and made from fake leather, so they're a bit squishy.
subtitles.english: ...and made from fake leather, so they're a bit squishy.

subtitles.original: And of course, you can make an ita-bag with these, too.
subtitles.english: And of course, you can make an ita-bag with these, too.

subtitles.english: These badges are actually made of fake leather, and they are square...

subtitles.original: 変わっておりますが、もちろんこれでも痛バッグとかできたりしますよ。
subtitles.english: ...which is unique, but of course you can use them to make an ita-bag!

subtitles.original: Last item is the smartphone ring, modeled after KFP chickens!
subtitles.english: Last item is the smartphone ring, modeled after KFP chickens!

subtitles.original: Maybe this way, holding your phones won't be as hard with your wings. Cute!
subtitles.english: Maybe this way, holding your phones won't be as hard with your wings. Cute!

subtitles.original: 最後のアイテムはスマホリング！もちろんKFPモチーフです！<
subtitles.english: The last item is a smartphone ring! Of course, it features a KFP motif!

subtitles.original: And besides that, there's also a voice pack.
subtitles.english: And besides that, there's also a voice pack.

subtitles.original: I haven't been doing any voice packs these past months, so make sure to get this one. Rare!
subtitles.english: I haven't been doing any voice packs these past months, so make sure to get this one. Rare!

subtitles.original: その他には久しぶりにボイスもあります！
subtitles.english: Other than that, there is also a voice pack after a long time!

subtitles.original: 最近あんまり参加してないので、ぜひこの機会に、お願いします！
subtitles.english: I haven't done many lately, so please take this opportunity to get it!

responses.thoughts:
**Subtitle Generation Thoughts**

Alright, let's break this down. My objective is to synchronize English and Japanese subtitles for this video segment. I've got to make sure the timing is perfect, down to the millisecond.

The video starts mid-performance, so I need to pick up the lyrics exactly where they begin. "昨日よりも愛して..." -- gotta make sure I nail the timing on that line. It sounds like she's singing "yori mo aishite" - "よりも愛して" so that must be accurate. Then, the "ハイ！ハイ！Wow wow yeah!" chants - have to ensure I translate those correctly, which is straightforward.

When the verse starts around 0:13, I'll pay close attention to her words, like "会ったら会ったで どこに行くでも ダラダラしてる" and ensure I get the nuances of the Japanese.

As the song progresses, the chorus and the instrumental sections require just as much precision. Then, during the MC part, I must capture every word and nuance during the merch announcement, making sure the transcript is accurate. The body pillow, the plushies, the badges, the smartphone ring, even the voice pack... I need to deliver every detail perfectly.

And, of course, the second chorus has a confetti cannon.

It all needs to be accurate. From the opening "愛して" to the merch description, every subtitle has to be perfectly synchronized, so the end-user can follow along precisely!
